tagline: Step into the hushed glow of Southern soul.
liner: Imagine standing in a dimly lit room where unspoken glances hold more weight than words. This slow-burning D# major track at 123 BPM invites you to close your eyes and feel the dusty, atmospheric intimacy creeping through every breathy syllable. The chopped vocals loop over heavy sub-bass, creating an underground club vibe that feels both distant and immediate. It captures a tense yet hypnotic moment of visual obsession, where a single clean frame freezes time between two souls connected by silence. As the intensity fades into a quiet afterglow, you are left with only the lingering echo of that connection.
worldCaption: A dusty Southern R&B atmosphere featuring heavy sub-bass and distant guitar textures creating an underground club vibe for intimate visual s

bios.lead: Breathes life into every hushed, repetitive note with closeness.
bios.back: Layers warmth beneath the lead voice without overpowering it.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking with a steady, hypnotic pulse.
bios.perc: Adds subtle texture to maintain tension throughout the journey.
bios.bass: Delivers heavy sub-frequencies that anchor every emotional moment.
bios.synth: Paints atmospheric skies above the dusty beat and vocals.
bios.other: Weaves distant guitar sounds into a surreal, dimly lit setting.
bios.guitar: Provides faint textures that drift through the darkened room.
